entities.auspicioushelper/ConnectedConta.name: Connected Container (template)
entities.auspicioushelper/ConnectedConta.description: Container for entities and decals to be added to roomless templates (place empty template entity overlapping)

placements.filterEntities: Whitelist or blacklist for entities. Whitelist if getEntities is false, blacklist if it is true. Should be a list of entity names (found in top of the entity box) with the format [modname]/[entityname]. Can use a * for fuzzy matching - for example, *Platform
placements.filterDecals: Similar to the filterEntities box. Uses the decal texture. Can use * for fuzzy matching - for example 4-cliffside/wood*
placements.getEntities: Whether the default behavior for entities should be to include them in the template
placements.getDecals: Whether the default behavior for decals should be to include them in the template
placements.excludeSolids: Whether to exclude solids, even if getEntities is checked (can be overriden by whitelisting in filterEntities)
placements.excludeTriggers: Whether to exclude triggers, even if getEntities is checked (can be overriden by whitelisting in filterEntities)

entities.auspicioushelper/ConnectedBlock.name: Connected Bg Tiles (template)
entities.auspicioushelper/ConnectedBlock.description: Background tiles that connect and can be used in roomless templates (place empty template entity overlapping)

entities.auspicioushelper/ConnectedBlock.name: Connected Fg Tiles (template)
entities.auspicioushelper/ConnectedBlock.description: Foreground tiles that connect and can be used in roomless templates (place empty template entity overlapping)

entities.auspicioushelper/CustomRefill.description: Fancy refill with some extra options

placements.triggering: Whether collecting this refill should trigger templates it is a part of
placements.useOnPickup: Whether to always use this refill if it is in a template that gets picked up
placements.useOnRelease: Whether to always use this refill when in a template that is thrown
placements.numRefresh: Number of times this refill will respawn. Leave blank or negative for unlimited use.

placements.makeFiller: Whether to make connections to other spinners
placements.numDebris: Number of shards to create when in a template that gets destroyed
placements.dreamThru: Whether to kill the player if the player is in a dream state (allows dreamblocks to go through this spinner)
placements.neverClip: Render as one image. Will get rid of gaps around solids.
placements.fancy: Fancy recoloring option. See wiki for details. For example (000,fff)->(fff,000)
placements.border: Border color. Can be transparent for borderless spinners.
